case_title: MIKO HANS BURKHOLDER VS. NORMAN YOUNG et al

docket_entries.description: PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-14-2002.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR IAN ALEXANDER FRASER-THOMSON.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-23-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. MAR-17-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT - ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-23-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKHOLDER, MIKO HANS AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, NORMAN DOES 1 TO 50 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-08-2002
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKHOLDER, MIKO HANS AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, NORMAN
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DANIEL JOSEPH KELLY.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURKHOLDER, MIKO HANS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, NORMAN $31,886.80 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $31,886.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE REMOVED FROM PENDING TRIAL DE NOVO CALENDAR - UNTIMELY
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-06-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT JURY REQUESTED BY THE PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKHOLDER, MIKO HANS JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-04-2002. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-09-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. SEP-06-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
TRIAL DE NOVO FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKHOLDER, MIKO HANS
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURKHOLDER, MIKO HANS SERVED JUN-17-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, NORMAN

ARBITRATOR IAN ALEXANDER FRASER-THOMSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-19-2002 THROUGH FEB-17-2003.
